Off Calendar Jul-31-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-02-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF REV CAPITAL (CALIFORNIA) INC. APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

Plaintiff Rev Capital's application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is denied. There are disputed issues precluding issuance of a right to attach order and writ of attachment regarding the existence and amount of unpaid invoices and late charges. Specifically, the court is unable to determine from the evidence submitted by the parties that there is probably validity to Rev Capital's claim for $120,825.70 in unpaid invoices and $386,038.91 in late charges. Notably the amount of the late charges is more than three times the amount of the unpaid invoices raising a host of concerns not addressed by Rev Capital including but not limited to whether the late charges are unconscionable fees and/or invalid liquid penalties. Moreover, Rev Capital has not shown that its claim is unsecured or partially secured.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and must drop a hard copy of the proposed order in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
